component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.

description.p: 全新引入首次启动设置向导，并优化了模组的元数据处理和信息同步体验。

ul.li: [新功能] 全新引入首次启动设置向导（Setup Wizard），自动引导新用户进行核心游戏路径选择、Java 运行环境检测与绑定、Steam 库导入以及用户协议确认，大幅简化首次配置流程。
[优化] 优化模组元数据处理和交互，提升了模组信息的识别与多平台元数据同步稳定性。

description.p: Introduced an initial Setup Wizard for first-time startup, and improved mod metadata handling and synchronization experience.

ul.li: [New] Introduced an initial Setup Wizard for first-time startup to guide users through selecting game directory, auto-detecting/binding Java, integrating Steam libraries, and confirming user agreements.
[Optimization] Refined mod metadata processing and UI interaction, improving the stability of metadata identification and synchronization.

description.p: 新增资源下载页浏览历史返回功能，优化翻页加载稳定性与模组信息保留机制，并改善多处交互体验。

ul.li: [新功能] 资源下载页支持浏览历史返回：点击作者名搜索后，可通过返回按钮或鼠标侧键回到之前的搜索结果和滚动位置。
[新功能] 翻页加载失败时会自动重试，多次失败后提供"手动继续加载"按钮，不再一翻页失败就丢失已有结果。
[优化] 翻页加载时底部显示骨架屏动画，替代之前的旋转图标，视觉体验更流畅。
[优化] 更新模组版本后，模组的名称、图标、描述等信息不再丢失，升级模组更省心。
[优化] 手动重命名模组文件后，启动器能自动识别并保留原有的模组信息记录。
[优化] 刷新模组列表时，已加载的图标和更新状态不再闪烁消失，列表更稳定。
[优化] 模组详情中切换到 CurseForge 源时，若未配置 API Key 会给出明确提示。
[优化] "重新识别全部模组"操作前会自动保存当前的元数据平台设置，避免设置丢失。

description.p: Added browsing history navigation in the download pages, improved load-more reliability with auto-retry, and enhanced mod metadata retention across updates.

ul.li: [New] Added browsing history back-navigation in the download pages: after clicking an author name to search, you can go back to your previous search results and scroll position via a back button or mouse side button.
[New] Load-more now automatically retries on failure, and shows a manual "Retry" button after repeated failures instead of discarding existing results.
[Optimization] Replaced the spinning loader with smooth skeleton animations when loading more results for a better visual experience.
[Optimization] Mod metadata (name, icon, description) is now preserved when updating to a new version, so you won't lose track of your mods after upgrading.
[Optimization] Manually renamed mod files are now automatically recognized and matched to their original metadata records.
[Optimization] Refreshing the mod list no longer causes loaded icons and update status indicators to flicker or disappear.
[Optimization] A clear message is now shown in Mod Details when CurseForge is selected but no API key is configured.
[Optimization] The "Re-identify All Mods" action now auto-saves your current metadata platform settings before running.

description.p: 新增已删除实例的友好提示，优化第三方登录与皮肤站的开启逻辑，并进一步提升了局域网联机安全性与设置页面的流畅度。

ul.li: [新功能] 新增已选中实例被删除时的友好提示与重新选择引导，避免因实例缺失导致启动异常。
[优化] 优化设置页面加载性能，系统字体在后台异步预加载，使页面打开更加流畅。
[优化] 优化局域网在线信任设备的安全校验机制，提升局域网安全性。
[优化] 优化资源下载页面的分类切换逻辑，切换标签时自动重置版本与加载器筛选。
[优化] 优化实例选择弹窗的滚动条显示效果。

description.p: Added friendly reminders for deleted instances, optimized the activation logic for third-party logins/skin stations, and improved LAN multiplayer security and Settings page responsiveness.

ul.li: [New] Added friendly notifications and re-selection guidance when a selected game instance is deleted to prevent startup errors.
[Optimization] Improved Settings page loading by preloading system fonts asynchronously in the background, making the UI smoother to open.
[Optimization] Enhanced the security verification mechanism for trusted devices on the local network to improve LAN multiplayer security.
[Optimization] Refined tab-switching logic in the download center, automatically resetting version and loader filters when changing tabs.
[Optimization] Enhanced the scrollbar experience within the instance selection modal.

description.p: 新增光影资源收藏支持，深度优化 Windows 平台下的文件链接创建逻辑，并美化了资源下载与新闻页面的动画效果及加载体验。

ul.li: [新功能] 资源下载支持直接收藏光影包，方便管理和快速下载常用光影。
[优化] 重构 Windows 文件链接创建逻辑，优先采用目录联接（Junction）和硬链接，不再需要管理员权限，并彻底解决 Minecraft 与 Java 无法识别文件符号链接的兼容性问题。
[优化] 优化资源下载页面，引入平滑的页面过渡动画与全新的骨架屏加载效果，消除界面加载闪烁。
[优化] 美化新闻列表页面，引入流畅的卡片载入动画与渐变投影，优化无障碍加载体验。
[优化] 改进 3D 皮肤预览器的渲染效率与性能表现，减少运行卡顿。
[优化] 调整下载默认配置，默认关闭分块下载以提升资源下载的兼容性与稳定性。

description.p: Added support for favoriting shader resources, optimized file linking logic on Windows, and enhanced animations and loading transitions for the download and news pages.

ul.li: [New] Added support for favoriting shader packs directly in the download section.

[Optimization] Refactored Windows file linking logic to prioritize directory junctions and hard links, eliminating the need for admin rights and solving compatibility issues where Java/Minecraft failed to recognize file symlinks.
[Optimization] Optimized the resource download page with smooth layout transition animations and a new shimmer skeleton loader.
[Optimization] Refreshed the news page with smooth card entry animations, gradient shadow styling, and improved loading experience.
[Optimization] Optimized 3D skin viewer rendering efficiency to deliver a smoother visual performance.
[Optimization] Disabled chunked downloads by default to improve general download compatibility and stability.

description.p: 新增游戏库与按键配置的云端同步、手柄键位管理以及多实例下载，并全面优化了列表性能、无障碍体验与暗黑模式样式。

ul.li: [新功能] 支持游戏库文件与手柄快捷键配置的 WebDAV 双向云同步，并具备冲突解决机制。
[新功能] 新增手柄按键映射与快捷键管理功能，支持配置默认键位。
[新功能] 优化资源下载逻辑，支持一键将资源下载并关联至多个游戏实例。
[新功能] 增加本地游戏实例自动识别与游戏版本检测功能。
[新功能] 新增 Steve 和 Sunny 等经典角色形象头像资源。
[优化] 引入虚拟列表技术重构关联管理面板，大幅提升大量资源项下的列表滚动性能。
[优化] 适配并美化了下载详情界面和资源卡片的暗黑模式样式。
[优化] 全面优化了手柄与键盘在各界面中的焦点导航与无障碍交互体验。
[优化] 优化了赞助者皮肤渲染与皇冠标识展示，并在游戏库页面右键菜单中增加资源类型标注。

description.p: Added cloud sync for library files and keymaps, custom keymap management, multi-instance resource downloads, and optimized list performance, accessibility, and dark mode.

ul.li: [New] Added WebDAV bi-directional cloud synchronization for library files and keymaps with conflict resolution.
[New] Added custom gamepad keymap and shortcut management with default bindings.
[New] Enhanced download logic to support downloading and linking resources to multiple game instances simultaneously.
[New] Added automatic local instance detection and game version handling.
[New] Added new character avatar assets (Steve and Sunny).
[Optimization] Integrated virtual lists in the manage linkage view to significantly improve scrolling performance for large collections.
[Optimization] Improved dark mode styles for resource cards and download detail components.
[Optimization] Overhauled gamepad and keyboard focus navigation across various views for a better accessibility experience.
[Optimization] Enhanced donor skin rendering and crown displays, and added resource type labels to context menus in the library.

description.p: 新增版本更新日志弹窗与翻译 API 配置，优化更新提示与项目图标动画效果。

ul.li: [新功能] 新增更新日志弹窗，支持在应用内查看版本更新记录并进行多语言翻译。
[新功能] 设置中新增翻译 API 配置，支持自定义翻译服务。
[优化] 引入平滑动画效果，提升项目图标的视觉动态体验并优化资源网格的响应式布局。
[优化] 改进更新提示功能，优化各组件的提示界面与交互表现。

description.p: Added a version changelog modal and translation API configuration, and optimized update reminders and project icon animations.

ul.li: [New] Added a version changelog modal to view update details in-app with translation support.
[New] Added translation API configuration and integration in settings.
[Optimization] Integrated animations for project icons and enhanced the responsiveness of the resource grid.
[Optimization] Enhanced update reminder functionality and adjusted related user interfaces.

description.p: 集成游戏启动前检查与修复机制，深度重构模组元数据管理，优化手柄焦点与无障碍交互体验。

ul.li: [新功能] 新增游戏启动前检查功能，支持自动补全与验证运行库，并提供运行时修复引导对话框。
[新功能] 支持游戏退出时自动备份世界存档，保障玩家存档安全。
[新功能] 模组管理支持收藏与置顶功能，并引入全新的模组元数据设置和删除确认弹窗。
[新功能] 引入全新的 OreCheckbox 基础组件，并整合至实例选择、资源卡片与网格视图中。
[新功能] 新增基础 UI 组件库展示与交互预览页面，方便开发与组件调试。
[优化] 重构模组详情、资源包、材质包、光影及存档管理面板，全面支持列表快照功能与性能指标展示。
[优化] 针对手柄操作大幅优化了新闻、微软账户侧边栏、下载管理器以及通用组件（卡片、下拉菜单等）的焦点跳转逻辑与空间导航无障碍体验。
[优化] 强化国际化多语言本地化支持，优化各级界面的英文等长文本布局溢出表现。

description.p: Integrated pre-launch verification & repair checks, overhauled mod metadata management, and optimized gamepad focus and accessibility.

ul.li: [New] Added pre-launch compatibility checks with automatic runtime verification/downloading and an interactive runtime repair dialog.
[New] Added automatic world save backups on game exit to safeguard player progress.
[New] Added support for favoriting/pinning mods, alongside new mod metadata settings and deletion confirmation modals.
[New] Introduced the OreCheckbox primitive component, integrated into instance selection and resource displays.
[New] Added an interactive UI component showcase page for previewing and testing primitive elements.
[Optimization] Refactored Mod, Resource Pack, Save, and Shader panels with snapshot tools and improved metadata layouts.
[Optimization] Overhauled focus navigation and accessibility for gamepads in News, Account Sidebar, Download Manager, and core primitives (dropdowns, buttons).
[Optimization] Enhanced internationalization support (i18n) and layouts to prevent text overflows.

description.p: 新增 WebDAV 同步与增强皮肤管理功能

ul.li: [新功能] 引入全新的 WebDAV 自动同步功能，支持跨设备同步启动器设置与皮肤资源。
[优化] 升级“衣柜”功能，全面增强了皮肤管理体验和模型渲染效果。

description.p: Added WebDAV sync and enhanced skin management

ul.li: [New] Introduced WebDAV auto-sync to effortlessly synchronize launcher settings and skin assets across devices.
[Optimization] Upgraded the Wardrobe feature with an enhanced skin management experience and improved 3D rendering.

description.p: 新增资源库功能，并改进资源浏览与掌机设置体验。

ul.li: 新增资源库，可收藏、整理和查看常用资源。
新增模组集跟踪，管理一组常用模组更方便。
下载页分类标签支持本地化，查找资源更直观。
优化资源列表和资源库的滚动体验，浏览更顺手。
新增掌机设置页，集中管理性能配置和 Steam Deck 按键布局。

description.p: Added the Library and improved browsing and handheld settings.

ul.li: Added a Library for saving, organizing, and viewing frequently used resources.
Added mod set tracking to make groups of favorite mods easier to manage.
Localized download category labels so resources are easier to find.
Improved scrolling in resource lists and the Library for smoother browsing.
Added a Handheld settings page for performance options and Steam Deck key layout controls.

description.p: 重构模组详情界面，优化性能并修复全屏模式开关失效问题

ul.li: [重构] 深度重构模组详情弹窗，适配小屏幕响应式布局，操作按钮移至底部操作区。
[新功能] 模组版本列表支持跨平台自动匹配，解决切换来源后找不到版本的问题。
[修复] 彻底修复全屏模式开关失效的 Bug，现在启动器设置可以强制覆盖游戏的内部全屏状态。
[优化] 大幅提升模组列表滚动流畅度，通过全新的图标预加载与缓冲机制解决了图标闪烁问题。
[优化] 改进了删除确认弹窗的排版，提升触控与手柄交互体验。

description.p: Overhauled Mod Detail UI, Performance Improvements, and Fullscreen Fix

ul.li: [Refactor] Deeply refactored the Mod Detail modal with a responsive layout for small screens and unified action buttons in the footer.
[New] Added cross-platform project ID matching for mod versions, ensuring history displays correctly when switching sources.
[Fix] Resolved a critical bug where the fullscreen toggle was ignored; the launcher now correctly enforces your preferred window mode.
[Optimization] Significant performance boost for mod list scrolling, eliminating icon flickering via an improved pre-loading and buffering system.
[Optimization] Improved layout of deletion confirmation dialogs for better touch and gamepad interaction.

description.p: 集成 Authlib-injector 支持与披风自定义功能

ul.li: [新功能] 集成 Authlib-injector 支持，支持第三方登录（如小皮肤、LittleSkin 等）。
[新功能] 支持自定义披风 URL，让你的角色外观更加个性化。
[新功能] 新增客户端安装遥测功能，并提供相关的隐私设置开关。
[优化] 重构了身份验证服务与登录界面，显著提升系统稳定性。

description.p: Integrated Authlib-injector Support and Custom Cape Support

ul.li: [New] Added Authlib-injector support for third-party authentication services like LittleSkin.
[New] Added support for custom cape URLs.
[New] Introduced client installation telemetry with a dedicated privacy toggle in settings.
[Optimization] Restructured authentication services and overhauled the login UI for better stability.
